comment: Move 0 hand-authored tree. ALIGNED to designing/docs/chorus-product-tree.md (Jeff+Wren intent-set 2026-05-14): SHAPING/Loom + DESIGNING/Athena+Convergence + DIRECTING/Chorus-knowledge+Clearing + BUILDING/Werk + PROVING/Borg. 31 Domains across 7 sub-Products + 2 root Products.

products.label: Chorus
products.comment: The coordination protocol. Per canonical: 6 sub-Products mapped to value-stream steps.
products.vision: Make agent-collaboration a substrate, not a heroic improvisation.
products.valueProposition: Coordination tax drops to ~zero per card so attention goes to actual product work.

products.label: Gathering
products.vision: A coherent, queryable record of Jeff's life as a knowledge graph.
products.valueProposition: One substrate for personal memory across music, photos, notes, stories, property, people.

products.label: Loom
products.vision: Every team norm citable by IRI, contracted by SHACL.
products.valueProposition: Decisions, principles, practices stop being lore and become substrate.
gaps: validators→Loom learning loop not yet wired

products.label: Athena
products.vision: The graph as interrogable as the logs already are.
products.valueProposition: Cards, code, tests reference tree IRIs; blast-radius/ownership/impact become queries.

products.label: Convergence
products.valueProposition: Cross-tree data flow stops being ad-hoc scripts.

products.label: Chorus (knowledge layer)
products.vision: Every artifact is queryable via one search surface.
gaps: memory + knowledge + search not yet unified

products.label: The Clearing
products.vision: Group alignment without losing the audit trail.

products.label: Werk
products.vision: Cardinal-six ceremonies work reliably every time.

products.label: Borg
products.vision: Every drift visible as structured spine event.
products.valueProposition: Team sees what's wrong before Jeff does.
gaps: validator→Loom proposal loop not yet wired

domains.label: roles
domains.comment: Role identity + emoji + kind.

domains.label: principles
domains.comment: Team's shared shaping principles. Phase-1 shipped #2447/#2477.
gaps: principle invocation API not yet built

domains.label: policies
domains.comment: Team-level operating policies.

domains.label: practices
domains.comment: Repeatable team-level moves.

domains.label: skills
domains.comment: Role-invocable skills — each is its own mix of claude-code/mcp/gates/hooks.

domains.label: decisions
domains.comment: DEC-NNN + ADR-NNN log. Phase-1 shipped #2485.
gaps: decision invocation API not yet built

domains.label: rcas
domains.comment: Root-cause analyses — post-incident reasoning artifacts.

domains.label: domains
domains.comment: The Domain class itself.

domains.label: services
domains.comment: The Service class itself — service-design docs as canonical anchors.
gaps: Service class not yet typed in graph

domains.label: integrations
domains.comment: NiFi pipelines, intake harvesters, semantic enrichment across Chorus + Gathering trees.

domains.label: memory
domains.comment: Auto-memory + persistent context.
gaps: memory + knowledge + search not yet unified

domains.label: knowledge
domains.comment: Athena + Loom surfaced as a queryable knowledge layer.

domains.label: search
domains.comment: Search across team artifacts.

domains.label: messages
domains.comment: Inter-role nudge messaging — chorus_nudge_message MCP + structured-message contract.

domains.label: streams
domains.comment: Multi-role chat surface — The Clearing app.

domains.label: spine
domains.comment: Structured event stream — every ceremony, validator, gate, refusal emits.

domains.label: cards
domains.comment: Team kanban. Per canonical: lives under The Clearing.

domains.label: pipelines
domains.comment: Build pipeline — local act + launchd-spawned act.

domains.label: version-control
domains.comment: Git, branches, commits, push, PR. #2944 added pre-push stale-base refusal.

domains.label: code
domains.comment: Source-code surface — TypeScript, Rust, bash, HTML/JS, docs.

domains.label: tests
domains.comment: Test surface — jest, cargo, bats. Nightly bats CI per #2941.

domains.label: builds
domains.comment: Rust binary signing + deploy to ~/.chorus/bin/, cdhash tracking.

domains.label: deploys
domains.comment: Service deploy + rollback verbs (#2605).

domains.label: logs
domains.comment: Loki streams, spine events, structured logging.
gaps: validator→Loom proposal feed not yet wired

domains.label: properties
domains.comment: Machine/host properties — per-machine inventory, capabilities, network config.

domains.label: alerts-monitors
domains.comment: Grafana alerts, health checks, threshold dashboards.

domains.label: security-trust
domains.comment: PreToolUse hooks, TCC AppleEvents, write attribution.

domains.label: time
domains.comment: Wall-clock service + timezone discipline.
gaps: timezone consistency across logs partly canonical

domains.label: heralds
domains.comment: Outbound notification surface — Slack, email, dashboards.

domains.label: toolchain
domains.comment: Developer tools — node, npm, cargo, rust toolchain, bats, jest.

domains.label: infrastructure
domains.comment: Compute, network, storage substrate — two Macs, Fuseki, Loki, Grafana, Prometheus, chorus-api, gathering app, LaunchAgents.
gaps: cross-machine ops defined; failover not formalized

services.label: cards-service
services.overview: The cards CLI + MCP surface that backs the team board.
services.asIs: cards CLI + chorus_cards_* MCP tools + bouncer hook + card-approval responder.
services.toBe: Tree-aware: cards verify domain-existence against tree.json at write time.
services.implementationPlan: Move 0 surfaced tree-aware lookups; Move 1-5 lands canonical OWL+SHACL.
services.pathToClose: Wire /gate-product to read tree.json (done #2940); migrate tags to IRIs (Move 4).

services.label: spine-service
services.overview: Structured event emission — chorus-log CLI + Rust shim + Loki ingestion path.
services.asIs: chorus-log emits structured JSON; trace_id / card_id propagated end-to-end.
services.toBe: Validators emit structured spine events that feed Loom learning corpus.
services.pathToClose: Wire validator emissions; Borg dashboard surface.
gaps: some events still emit without card_id

services.label: chorus-hooks
services.overview: Rust hook daemon — bouncers, drift sensors, retired-predicate refusals, card-approval responder.
services.asIs: Daemon on launchctl; PreToolUse + UserPromptSubmit hooks; bouncer + responder shipped #2924.
services.toBe: Retired-predicate refusal at Move 1; cite-by-ID lint at Move 4.
services.implementationPlan: Athena's contract becomes the hook layer's enforcement target.
services.pathToClose: Responder retry-loop fix #2938; chorus.ttl direct-edit hook Move 5.

services.label: version-control-service
services.overview: Atomic commit+push via git-queue.sh; #2944 added pre-push stale-base refusal.
services.toBe: Branch tags resolve to tree IRIs; preview-deploy-from-branch closes demo-vs-acp inversion.
services.implementationPlan: Move 0 makes tree IRIs queryable; preview-deploy a substrate-redesign card.
